items.title: is ai profitable yet
items.note: tracking claims of when ai will be profitable, highly doubt it ever does with the current claims from companies and ceos

items.title: [the atlantic] 'the age of reading is over' (archived)
items.note: article getting passed around lot. it goes into the recent decline of reading as a past time and the larger implications it may mean if this trend continues

items.title: 11ty tutorial
items.note: a fork of an 11ty tutorial. i highly recommend if you're considering 11ty for your personal website

items.title: uncovered.ink
items.note: a cool project that lets you read sample passages from books, without revealing their title or author, leaving you to judge a book with minimal information.

items.title: resource list for building personal websites
items.note: good resource with a bounty of tools and websites to make your own personal site.
